programme.title: One Eyed Jacks 1961
programme.desc: Marlon Brando directs and stars in One-Eyed Jacks, a gripping Western of betrayal and revenge. As outlaw Rio (Brando) breaks free from prison, he sets his sights on settling the score with his former partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), who double-crossed him years before and now wears the badge of a sheriff. But Rio’s quest for vengeance grows complicated when he falls for Longworth’s spirited daughter, leaving him torn between love and justice. Sweeping vistas, raw emotion, and Brando’s electrifying presence make this a Western unlike any other.

programme.title: September 11th: Mayhem or Miracles?
programme.desc: The September 11, 2001 attacks impacted American society like no event since Pearl Harbor. This program examines the heroes who emerged amidst the horror of 9-11 and shows the selflessness of everyday men and women under the most adverse conditions.

programme.title: Ghost Attack on Sutton Street: Poltergeists and Paranormal Entities
programme.desc: Expert Ghost Hunters from Haunted Events UK search for life-after death in the notoriously haunted Old Street Market of Sutton Town in historic old England. The area is so haunted that within minutes the investigation's medium is contacted by not one, but four spirits, warning them not to split up or risk their lives.Ignoring the advice, they split into two teams. The first team lead by UK Paranormal Expert Lee Roberts, comes face to face with the child murderer named Tap Tap, who taunts them with noises and poltergeist activity. Team two uses thermal imaging cameras to pick up humanoid forms and warm hand prints, further witnessing their devices shockingly moved before their eyes, chairs tipping over, tables levitating, glasses thrown and doors slamming. The nightbecomes so terrifying that the hunt is called off, but not before one final terrifying incident. You have never witnessed a ghost hunt like this before. Blair Witch was a movie. This is real. Prepare yourselves for the most shocking Ghost Hunt ever recorded.

programme.title: 3:15 AM
programme.desc: LONG - Horror strikes at 3:15 AM in ways never before imagined. Truth is stranger than fiction in this euro horror anthology that opens a new dimension in sheer terror. This cutting edge horror anthology from France will curl your toes and rattle your soul.

programme.title: Paranormal Prisons: Portal to Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Who is the bloody figure wielding a meat cleaver, seen racing through the alleys of British Columbia’s Chinatown? Whoever he is, he has terrified dozens of witnesses, who have never been the same afterwards. The brutal history of Cornwall Jail, Ottawa’s most notorious prison, lives on as ghostly apparitions of tortured inmates terrorize modern visitors. In its heyday it was home to vicious criminals, and sadistic guards. Hangings, whippings and torture were daily affairs and spirits from that era still linger on in the maze of cell blocks and corridors. Many male criminals were hanged at the Northwest Mounted Police outpost known as Fort Saskatchewan, but only one woman. Florence Lassandro was dubbed the Mob Princess, and her spirit is one of many seen on the grounds and in the preserved buildings of this historic site. Journey through several of the world's most haunted prisons and experience real portals to hell on earth.

programme.title: California Paranormal
programme.desc: SHORT - (Cable / Digital) California is a weird place, but just how weird can best be told by residents with bone chilling true stories of Paranormal and Supernatural encounters that defy description - from Alien visitations to Poltergeist manifestations that will make your skin crawl.

programme.desc: The World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with the creation of this unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments, and has broadcast globally in over 150 countries and territories. programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach presented by Bonsoy 2025
programme.desc: Bells Beach on Victoria's South Coast is the longest-running surfing competition and will host the 62st edition this year. Bells is Australian surfing heritage. With the hope of scoring long-period, groomed walls, the surfers will need to display the perfect combination of power, precision, and timing. The biggest surfing legends have had the honor of winning and ringing ‘The Bell' and 2025 will see a hungry new generation vying for the opportunity to cement their names in one of surfing's most prestigious events.

programme.title: 2019 Drug Aware Margaret River Pro Finals | REPLAY
programme.desc: The world’s best surfers are back at the edge of the world! The Margaret River Pro in Western Australia is the rawest event on tour - home to some of the heaviest waves, the most abundant wildlife and biggest performances of the year. Watch the WSL Elite take on one another and Mother Nature at the Margaret River Pro

programme.title: Surf Drums | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 2
programme.desc: Sam, Easkey, and Adrien travel north to Kayar, a city dominated by its busy fishing industry. They learn that surfing has created new work opportunities for the younger generation through teaching and competition. They then dive into the rich culture of Mbalax music, learn about djembe drumming, and discover how its rhythm is similar to that of surfing.
